Rules.InvariantScript:
Switch(gblDetailCR.CRStatus.Value,
  "Draft", RGBA(149,165,166,1),
  "Submitted", RGBA(110,140,176,1),
  "PMO Review", RGBA(31,55,100,1),
  "In Assessment", RGBA(243,156,18,1),
  "PMO Consolidation", RGBA(243,156,18,1),
  "Programme Meeting", RGBA(31,55,100,1),
  "Pre-SG Distribution", RGBA(31,55,100,1),
  "SG Review", RGBA(31,55,100,1),
  "Post-Meeting Edits", RGBA(243,156,18,1),
  "Approved", RGBA(39,174,96,1),
  "Deferred", RGBA(149,165,166,1),
  "Rejected", RGBA(192,57,43,1),
  "Closed", RGBA(149,165,166,1),
  RGBA(31,55,100,1)
)
Notify("Use the SG Decision panel below to record the outcome.", NotificationType.Information)

Switch(ThisItem.RAGStatus.Value,
  "Green", RGBA(39,174,96,1),
  "Amber", RGBA(243,156,18,1),
  "Red", RGBA(192,57,43,1),
  "Grey", RGBA(149,165,166,1),
  RGBA(174,214,241,1)
)

/*
  CR Detail Screen — OnVisible
  Purpose: Display read-only CR detail and PMO workflow action buttons.
           Re-fetches the CR record to reflect any status changes made elsewhere.
  Author:  IAG Tech Developer
  Date:    07 Apr 2026
*/
// Refresh gblDetailCR so status pills are always current.
If(Not(IsBlank(gblDetailCR)),
  Set(gblDetailCR, LookUp(CRRequests, ID = gblDetailCR.ID))
)
